test.command: cd cli && cargo test; cd ../spikes-hosted/worker && npx vitest run

appliedUpdates.description: Added reliability implementation notes to .factory/library/architecture.md covering D1 FK test nuance, Worker IP extraction order, ureq status parsing, and ExecutionContext/waitUntil guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a Worker convention that handlers requiring asynchronous post-response work must accept and use ExecutionContext with ctx.waitUntil(...).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: webhook-reliability review found retries implemented but noted fetch signature currently omits ExecutionContext, making guaranteed background completion harder.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add worker-specific guidance for request schema conventions (e.g., centralized Zod schemas, standardized ErrorCodes, and validation error formatting) to reduce drift across backend features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: request-validation-zod review observed conventions are followed in code but not explicitly documented for future workers.

rejectedObservations.observation: No new services or commands needed
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate across multiple reviews and no action required
expected behavior, not a shared-state update candidate
already-documented and non-actionable without a gap
